title: Beam Weight Calculator
description: Industrial-grade beam weight estimation tool compliant with ISO 9001, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards. Calculates theoretical weight, material cost, and hidden loss drivers for steel beams.

inputs.label: Beam Type
inputs.businessContext: Standard structural steel profiles per ASTM A6/A6M.

inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Typical steel density 7850 kg/m³; adjust for alloys (e.g., stainless ~8000).

inputs.label: Beam Length
inputs.businessContext: Standard stock lengths: 6m, 12m; custom up to 30m.

inputs.label: Flange Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of top/bottom flange for I/H-beams.

inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Current market price for structural steel.

inputs.label: Cutting Loss Factor
inputs.businessContext: Lean allowance for saw kerf and scrap.

inputs.label: Surface Condition
inputs.businessContext: Affects handling and coating weight adjustments.

rules.message: Flange width exceeds 2x web height – unusual geometry, verify dimensions.
Web slenderness > 100 – potential buckling risk per AISC 360.
Flange width/thickness > 30 – check local buckling limits.
Length > 12m – special transport and handling required.

thresholds.message: Total weight exceeds 5,000 kg – crane capacity may be insufficient.
Material cost > $10,000 – consider bulk discount or alternative material.
Cutting loss > 5% – review nesting and cutting process (Lean Six Sigma waste reduction).

formulas.label: Cross-Sectional Area
formulas.description: Total cross-sectional area of the beam profile (simplified for I/H-beam).

formulas.label: Volume per Beam
formulas.description: Volume of one beam in cubic meters (conversion from mm²·m to m³).

formulas.label: Weight per Beam
formulas.description: Theoretical weight of one beam without coating.

formulas.label: Coating Weight per Beam
formulas.description: Estimated coating weight (0.2 mm equivalent thickness on exposed surfaces).

formulas.label: Total Weight (All Beams)
formulas.description: Aggregate weight for the order quantity.

primary.label: Total Weight
primary.description: Primary result: total weight of all beams including coating and cutting loss.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Cutting Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Material lost due to cutting (kerf, scrap).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Coating Overhead
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Additional weight from coating if included.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Dimensional Tolerance Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated weight variation due to rolling tolerances (ISO 9001: ±2% typical).

suggestedActions.action: Optimize nesting and use CNC saw to reduce cutting loss below 3%.
If web slenderness > 100, consider stiffeners or thicker web to meet AISC 360.
suggestedActions.expected_impact: Improve structural integrity and reduce buckling risk.

suggestedActions.action: For total weight > 5000 kg, negotiate bulk material discount (typically 5-10%).
suggestedActions.expected_impact: Reduce total cost by up to 10%.
